answer.valueString: Gastroscopy 2013 - mild reflux esophagitis, H pylori negative

valueCoding.display: Panadol Osteo 665 mg modified release tablet

answer.valueString:
Smoking - 20 cigarettes per day since 17yo
Alcohol - 2 drinks, 2 days per week (on weekends)
5-10% weight loss (target weight 73.8-77.9kg) and decrease waist circumference (long term target <80cm)
Comfortably wear dress purchase for niece's wedding next year
Reduce ratio of carbohydrates in each meal – ¼ plate carbs, ¼ plate protein, ½ plate vegetables/salad
Substitute high GI for low GI carbohydrates where possible
Aim for 150 mins of aerobic activity per week
2-3 sessions of resistance exercise per week

Manage impulsivity/desire to eat when not actually hungry
Consider psychology input in future

item.text: Consent given for sharing of information with relevant healthcare providers
Patient has been offered a copy of this plan
